tasks_completed: Implemented React/Vite initial live snapshot loading from /api/snapshot with explicit fixture fallback through /api/fixtures only when requested.

Added SSE consumption for /api/events with typed event merging, idempotent source/round/inbox/activity updates, cursor resume, bounded reconnect UI, stale-data preservation, and global/per-source health indicators.
Added frontend tests for snapshot and event contracts, fixture fallback labeling, duplicate event merging, stale preservation, source-specific failure handling, and SSE cursor resume.
Added new-UI live-mode deployment default, docs for separate access and fixture mode, and smoke checks for /api/snapshot, /api/events, read-only safeguards, and endpoint coexistence.
summary: Wired the new UI replacement slice to the accepted Group A live contract: /api/snapshot for initial state, /api/events for SSE updates, runtime preview paths surfaced in UI, explicit fixture fallback, reconnect/stale/source health UI, frontend coverage, and new-UI-only live smoke/coexistence checks. Branch pushed to origin.
